label: Terminus Shutterhouse
description: Terminus Shutterhouse is a compact basalt residence built into the salt-cemented fabric of Brineshade Terminator City, its exterior defined by deep-set apertures and layered glare-baffles tuned to Saltharrow’s hard white radiance. The interior plan follows a narrow axial hall with low lintels and thick partition walls that stabilize temperature against the mineral-laden haze and constant terminator contrast. Polished saltstone thresholds and recessed storage niches are cut directly into the fused basalt, minimizing loose fittings under persistent tidal stresses. A roofline service terrace carries fixed anchor points and screened vents aligned to the city’s charted corridors and beacon sightlines.
